name: CodeNode return-correlation matrix (NASDAQ)
description: StartNode -> OverseasStockBrokerNode -> OverseasStockHistoricalDataNode(5 NASDAQ names, 1d) -> CodeNode(hand-rolled pairwise return correlation matrix + per-symbol average correlation via statistics.correlation, stdlib only) -> TableDisplayNode. Educational hand-roll reference for the CorrelationAnalysis plugin. Symbols with fewer than 3 closes are emitted in 'skipped'; degenerate (constant) series yield corr=None, not a crash. dry_run-safe.
